brand.name: Alex and Ani
brand.price_range: $22–$88 (core range); sale items from $4.90; premium sets up to $150
brand.materials: recycled metals (primarily copper), stainless steel, crystals
brand.tone: Uplifting, empowering, and spiritually warm — the brand focuses on how jewelry makes the wearer feel rather than purely how it looks. Messaging is celebratory, inclusive, and affirmation-driven, with a strong emphasis on personal milestones, relationships, and positive energy.
brand.usp: To design and create meaningful, eco-conscious jewelry and accessories that positively empower and connect humanity — adorning the body, enlightening the mind, and empowering the spirit.

products.name: 'Babe' Crystal Tennis Bracelet
products.description: A modern tennis bracelet featuring sleek metal letters spelling 'BABE' set against a strand of shimmering crystals. Available in silver and gold tones.
key_features: Bold metal letter spelling in center
Available in silver and gold finishes

products.name: 'Make Your Own Luck' Ladybug Charm Bangle
products.description: An expandable wire charm bangle featuring a ladybug charm with the empowering message 'Make Your Own Luck'. Part of the Spring 2025 collection.
key_features: Expandable wire bangle — one size fits all
Ladybug symbol charm with opening mechanism
Designed for stacking with other bangles

products.name: Sweethearts 'Melt My Heart' Multi Charm Bangle
products.description: A romantic multi-charm bangle inspired by the iconic Sweethearts candy, featuring multiple heart and candy-themed charms on an expandable wire base.
key_features: Multi-charm design with Sweethearts candy motifs
Expandable wire construction for universal fit

products.name: Espresso Martini Multi Charm Bangle
products.description: A playful multi-charm bangle celebrating the beloved espresso martini cocktail, featuring coffee and cocktail-themed charms on a gold expandable wire.

products.name: Glass Butterfly Beaded Charm Bangle
products.description: An elegant beaded bangle featuring a delicate glass butterfly charm, available in silver. Combines nature-inspired symbolism with the brand's signature expandable wire format.

products.name: Token of Love Charm Bangle
products.description: A meaningful charm bangle celebrating love and affection, designed as a stackable everyday piece. Part of Alex and Ani's core relationship-focused collection.

products.name: 'Love' Crystal Tennis Necklace
products.description: A statement adjustable tennis necklace featuring sparkling cubic zirconia crystals with the word 'LOVE' as the focal centerpiece. Available in gold and silver.
key_features: Available in gold and silver finishes

products.name: 'Mama' Crystal Tennis Necklace
products.description: A modern crystal tennis necklace spelling out 'MAMA' in sleek metal letters along a crystal-studded chain — a heartfelt gift for mothers.

products.name: 'Opportunity Is Everywhere' Open Tusk Cuff Bracelet
products.description: A silver-tone stainless steel open cuff bracelet with tusk-shaped crystal-encrusted ends, engraved with the affirmation 'Opportunity Is Everywhere' on the interior.

products.name: 'Attitude of Gratitude' Charm Bangle
products.description: An inspirational charm bangle with the message 'Attitude of Gratitude', reminding wearers that everyday is a gift. A core affirmation piece from the brand's signature collection.
key_features: Part of the core affirmations collection

products.name: 2025 Winter Snowflake Charm Bangle
products.description: A limited edition 2025 bangle featuring a delicate tonal pink crystal snowflake charm paired with a '2025' year plaque. A collectible seasonal piece in silver and gold.
key_features: Crystal snowflake charm with year plaque
Available in shiny silver and gold finishes

products.name: PEEPS Chick and Bunny Beaded Bangle
products.description: A fun licensed collaboration bangle featuring PEEPS chick and bunny beads on an expandable gold-tone wire. Part of the Spring/Easter 2026 PEEPS collection.
